prerequisites: An active Revolut Business account with the Merchant account feature enabled (the Merchant API is unavailable without an active Merchant account).
A generated Merchant API Secret key (the `secret_api_key` field). Generate it in Revolut Business under Settings (or the Merchant overview) > APIs > Merchant API.

A decision on which environment to target via the `environment` field: Sandbox (https://sandbox-merchant.revolut.com/) for testing or Production (https://merchant.revolut.com/) for live data. Sandbox and Production each have their own Secret key.
A Merchant API version string for the `api_version` field, supplied as a date (for example 2024-09-01), sent in the Revolut-Api-Version request header.
A `start_date` marking the earliest point from which to begin syncing records.

authMethods.name: Secret API key (Bearer token)
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with the `secret_api_key` field. Revolut Merchant API server-side calls send the Secret key in the HTTP header as `Authorization: Bearer <yourSecretApiKey>`. Use the Sandbox Secret key for the Sandbox environment and the Production Secret key for Production.

setupSteps.title: Confirm an active Merchant account
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Revolut Business. The Merchant API requires an active Merchant account; if you do not have one, apply for or activate it before continuing. For testing without a real account, you can instead create a Revolut Sandbox account.

setupSteps.title: Generate the Secret API key
setupSteps.body: In Revolut Business, open Settings (cog icon) or the Merchant overview, then go to APIs > Merchant API. Under the Production API key, click Generate to create your unique Production Secret key (only needed the first time). For testing, get the Sandbox Secret key from the same Merchant API settings in your Sandbox account. Copy the Secret key into the connector's `secret_api_key` field.

setupSteps.title: Select the environment
setupSteps.body: Set the `environment` field to match the key you are using. Sandbox routes calls to https://sandbox-merchant.revolut.com/ and Production routes calls to https://merchant.revolut.com/. The Sandbox and Production Secret keys are not interchangeable.

setupSteps.title: Set the API version
setupSteps.body: Set the `api_version` field to a supported Merchant API version date (for example 2024-09-01). The connector sends this in the Revolut-Api-Version request header, which the Merchant API requires for version-aware endpoints.

setupSteps.title: Set the sync start date
setupSteps.body: Set the `start_date` field to the earliest date from which records should be synced. The connector will pull data on or after this date.

sources.title: Merchant API - Revolut Developer Portal (authentication, Authorization Bearer and Revolut-Api-Version headers, base URL)
Merchant API versions - Revolut Docs (Revolut-Api-Version request header versioning)
Set up a test environment with Revolut Sandbox - Revolut Developer (sandbox-merchant.revolut.com base URL and Sandbox Secret key)
What is the Merchant API key and where can I find it? - Revolut Help (Merchant account requirement, generate Production API key under Settings > APIs > Merchant API)
